content.name: content
content.description: The content to show in the overlay (e.g. Coachmarks, any custom node)

gap.name: gap
gap.description: Gap in px between trigger edge and overlay

enterDelay.name: enterDelay
enterDelay.description: Delay in ms before showing on hover

leaveDelay.name: leaveDelay
leaveDelay.description: Delay in ms before hiding on hover

interactive.name: interactive
interactive.description: Keep overlay interactive (mouse events pass through)

autoAdjustOverflow.name: autoAdjustOverflow
autoAdjustOverflow.description: Flip to opposite side if viewport overflow detected

maxWidth.name: maxWidth
maxWidth.description: Max width of the overlay container

onPlacementChange.name: onPlacementChange
onPlacementChange.description: Called with the actual placement after any auto-flip

overlayStyle.name: overlayStyle
overlayStyle.description: Extra styles applied to the overlay portal div

dismissOnOutsideClick.name: dismissOnOutsideClick
dismissOnOutsideClick.description: Close the overlay when clicking outside both the trigger and the overlay. Only applies to trigger="click" and trigger="manual".

onError.name: onError
onError.description: Callback when audio fails to load or play (e.g. expired presigned URL, network error)

playIcon.name: playIcon
playIcon.description: Custom play icon — receives { size: number }

pauseIcon.name: pauseIcon
pauseIcon.description: Custom pause icon — receives { size: number }

avatarType.name: avatarType
avatarType.description: Avatar type: initials, image, numeric, icon

subtext.name: subtext
subtext.description: @description Optional subtext shown below the label

arrowPosition.name: arrowPosition
arrowPosition.description: Which edge + alignment the arrow sits on

image.name: image
image.description: Optional image slot (shown at top of card)

ctas.name: ctas
ctas.description: Optional CTA row slot — pass Tarmac <Button> components

onClose.name: onClose
onClose.description: Called when user closes the sheet (Cancel or overlay click)

onSave.name: onSave
onSave.description: Called when user clicks Save with the selected date

className.name: className
className.description: Additional className on the sheet panel

pickerStyle.name: pickerStyle
pickerStyle.description: Activates the Tarmac TDS rendering path

value.name: value
value.description: Controlled value — single Date for singleDateMode, or { start, end } for range mode

onApply.name: onApply
onApply.description: Callback for apply/confirm — receives single Date in singleDateMode, range object otherwise

displayFormat.name: displayFormat
displayFormat.description: String-based display format for the trigger. Supports: 'MM/DD/YYYY', 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'YYYY-MM-DD', or pass Intl options via dateFormat

dividerType.name: dividerType
dividerType.description: Divider type: solid line or dashed

renderOption.name: renderOption
renderOption.description: Custom render function for each option — use DropdownList sub-components for composition

placeholder.name: placeholder
placeholder.description: Placeholder shown in the trigger when nothing is committed

value.name: value
value.description:
Pre-selected / externally committed values.
Seeds the committed state on mount and whenever it changes.

onChange.name: onChange
onChange.description:
Fired on every option click with the current in-panel selection.
- Single select: fires with the committed value immediately.
- Multi + no Apply: fires on each toggle (committed immediately).
- Multi + Apply: fires on each toggle (informational, not yet committed).

onApply.name: onApply
onApply.description:
Fired when Apply is clicked with the confirmed selection.
Only relevant when `multiple` and `hasApply` are both true (the default).

maxVisibleLabels.name: maxVisibleLabels
maxVisibleLabels.description: Max selected labels shown before overflow count pill

searchable.name: searchable
searchable.description: Show a search input inside the panel to filter options

hasApply.name: hasApply
hasApply.description:
When true (and multiple=true), selection stays in a "draft" state until
Apply is clicked. When false, each checkbox click commits immediately.
Has no effect when multiple=false (single select always commits immediately).

addonLeft.name: addonLeft
addonLeft.description: Interactive addon content for the left slot — takes priority over addonText when styleVariant="addonLeft"

addonRight.name: addonRight
addonRight.description: Interactive addon content for the right slot — takes priority over addonText when styleVariant="addonRight"

value.name: value
value.description:
Current array of tag items (controlled).
Accepts either:
 - `TagItem[]` (objects with value + status)
 - `string[]`  (shorthand — each string treated as `{ value: str, status: 'default' }`)

onChange.name: onChange
onChange.description:
Called when tags change.
Always emits `TagItem[]` so the consumer has full control over statuses.

tokenSeparators.name: tokenSeparators
tokenSeparators.description: Characters that trigger tag creation when typed/pasted

placeholder.name: placeholder
placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when no tags exist

errorMessage.name: errorMessage
errorMessage.description: Error message to display below the input

customClearErrorButtonText.name: customClearErrorButtonText
customClearErrorButtonText.description: Text for the clear error button

onClearErrors.name: onClearErrors
onClearErrors.description: Called when the clear error button is clicked

showClearErrorButton.name: showClearErrorButton
showClearErrorButton.description: Show/hide the clear error button (default: true when onClearErrors provided)

className.name: className
className.description: Additional className for the root wrapper

containerClassName.name: containerClassName
containerClassName.description: Additional className for the tag container

containerStyle.name: containerStyle
containerStyle.description: Style overrides for the tag container

height.name: height
height.description: Container height (CSS value or number in px)

width.name: width
width.description: Container width (CSS value or number in px)

points.name: points
points.description: Array of points to plot on the map

onPointClick.name: onPointClick
onPointClick.description: Fires when a marker is clicked

onPopupClose.name: onPopupClose
onPopupClose.description:
Fires when the popup is closed — whether by clicking the MapPopup close
button, clicking outside the popup, or toggling the same marker again.
Receives the point whose popup was dismissed.

className.name: className
className.description: Additional CSS class for the container

geofences.name: geofences
geofences.description: Array of geofences to render on the map

children.name: children
children.description: Render additional react-map-gl layers/sources as children

glyphs.name: glyphs
glyphs.description: Glyph font URL (defaults to openmaptiles CDN)

sprite.name: sprite
sprite.description: Sprite URL for map icons (defaults to osm-liberty)

bounds.name: bounds
bounds.description: Bounding box to restrict tile fetching

extraLayers.name: extraLayers
extraLayers.description: Additional layers to append after the default Tegola layers

glyphs.name: glyphs
glyphs.description: Glyph font URL (defaults to openmaptiles CDN)

sprite.name: sprite
sprite.description: Sprite URL for map icons (defaults to osm-liberty)

bounds.name: bounds
bounds.description: Bounding box to restrict tile fetching

extraLayers.name: extraLayers
extraLayers.description: Additional layers to append after the default Tegola layers

onClose.name: onClose
onClose.description: Called on overlay click and swipe-down dismiss

className.name: className
className.description: Additional className on the sheet panel

style.name: style
style.description: Inline style on the sheet panel

children.name: children
children.description: Content rendered inside the sliding panel

maxWidth.name: maxWidth
maxWidth.description: Max width of the sheet (default 480px — mobile)

swipeThreshold.name: swipeThreshold
swipeThreshold.description: Swipe-down threshold in px to trigger close (default 50)

unmountDelay.name: unmountDelay
unmountDelay.description: Duration of the close-to-unmount delay in ms (default 300)

paginationStyle.name: paginationStyle
paginationStyle.description: Discriminator — set to 'tarmac-01' to activate the Tarmac TDS rendering path

cellStyle.name: cellStyle
cellStyle.description: Number cell active style (Black/Legacy Blue/DLV Red). Only used when paginationStyle is set.

tarmacSize.name: tarmacSize
tarmacSize.description: Tarmac size variant (lg/md/sm). Only used when paginationStyle is set.

showTextLeft.name: showTextLeft
showTextLeft.description: Show the left text group (e.g. "Showing 200"). Maps to Figma "Text right" boolean.

showNumberCells.name: showNumberCells
showNumberCells.description: Show the number cell group. Maps to Figma "Number Cells" boolean.

showTextRight.name: showTextRight
showTextRight.description: Show the right text group (e.g. "Previous | Next"). Maps to Figma "Text Left" boolean.

isDisabled.name: isDisabled
isDisabled.description: Disabled state for the Tarmac pagination

showDivider.name: showDivider
showDivider.description: Show the divider between Previous and Next in the right text group. Maps to Figma "Divider" boolean. Defaults to true.

prevIcon.name: prevIcon
prevIcon.description: Custom icon for the Previous button (defaults to keyboard-arrow-left)

nextIcon.name: nextIcon
nextIcon.description: Custom icon for the Next button (defaults to keyboard-arrow-right)

textCount.name: textCount
textCount.description: Text count variant for the left text group (single/dual/triple/quad). Defaults to 'single'.

textItems.name: textItems
textItems.description: Additional text items rendered after the showTotal text, separated by dividers (used in dual/triple/quad counts)

showPageCell.name: showPageCell
showPageCell.description: Whether to show the page number cell in the left text group (Single count variant). Defaults to true when textCount='single'.

showLeftIconButton.name: showLeftIconButton
showLeftIconButton.description: Whether to show the icon button in the left text group (Single count variant). Defaults to true when textCount='single'.

onLeftIconButtonClick.name: onLeftIconButtonClick
onLeftIconButtonClick.description: Callback when the left icon button is clicked

classNames.name: classNames
classNames.description: Custom class names for different parts of the pagination

styles.name: styles
styles.description: Custom styles for different parts of the pagination

hasNextPage.name: hasNextPage
hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page (for cursor-based pagination)

hasPreviousPage.name: hasPreviousPage
hasPreviousPage.description: Whether there is a previous page (for cursor-based pagination)

onNext.name: onNext
onNext.description: Callback when next page is clicked (for cursor-based pagination)

onPrevious.name: onPrevious
onPrevious.description: Callback when previous page is clicked (for cursor-based pagination)

barType.name: barType
barType.description: Setting barType activates the TDS rendering path

subtext.name: subtext
subtext.description: @description Optional subtext shown below the label

value.name: value
value.description: Rating value (0 to maxStars, supports 0.5 increments)

ratingStyle.name: ratingStyle
ratingStyle.description: Rating style: stars, emojis, or slider

title.name: title
title.description: Title text shown in the popup header

value.name: value
value.description: Current rating value (1-based index for emojis/stars, 0-100 for slider)

items.name: items
items.description:
Configurable rating items — each entry has an icon and a label.
For emojis: `[{ icon: "😔", label: "Unhappy" }, ...]`
For stars: `[{ icon: "⭐", label: "Poor" }, ...]`
For slider: `[{ icon: "😔", label: "Unhappy" }, ...]` (mapped to slider ranges)
The badge auto-derives its text from the selected item's label.

feedbackInput.name: feedbackInput
feedbackInput.description: Custom feedback input node — pass a <TextArea> or any element. When provided, showFeedback renders it.

maxStars.name: maxStars
maxStars.description: Max stars count (only for stars style, ignored when items is provided)

footerActions.name: footerActions
footerActions.description: Custom footer actions (overrides default submit button)

children.name: children
children.description: Children for full composition mode (bypasses default rendering)

bgImage.name: bgImage
bgImage.description: Background image URL for the sidebar

expandIcon.name: expandIcon
expandIcon.description: Icon for expand action (FontAwesome icon name or ReactNode)

collapseIcon.name: collapseIcon
collapseIcon.description: Icon for collapse action (FontAwesome icon name or ReactNode)

topIcon.name: topIcon
topIcon.description: Top icon (FontAwesome icon name or ReactNode)

hidden.name: hidden
hidden.description: Hide all sidebar items if true

message.name: message
message.description: Primary text (Single Text mode) or description (Dual Text mode when title is provided)

title.name: title
title.description: When provided, enables Dual Text mode — title above, message below

trailingIcon.name: trailingIcon
trailingIcon.description: Show trailing icon (dismiss/close button). Alias: closable

tarmacVariant.name: tarmacVariant
tarmacVariant.description: @description Tarmac TDS variant (tarmac-01/02/03/04) — activates Tarmac rendering path

variant.name: variant
variant.description: Status variant — drives icon and dot color from theme

label.name: label
label.description: Text label displayed next to the icon

icon.name: icon
icon.description: Custom icon — overrides the default dot SVG

stepperStyle.name: stepperStyle
stepperStyle.description: Visual style / color family of the stepper icon

stepNumber.name: stepNumber
stepNumber.description: Step number shown for numeric style

icon.name: icon
icon.description: Custom icon node for icon style

stepNumber.name: stepNumber
stepNumber.description: Step number shown in the icon (numeric style)

icon.name: icon
icon.description: Custom icon node for icon-style stepper

tarmacColor.name: tarmacColor
tarmacColor.description: @description Tarmac TDS color (black/blue/dlv_red/green) — activates Tarmac rendering path

isGhost.name: isGhost
isGhost.description: @description Ghost state — renders a placeholder toggle

showCheckbox.name: showCheckbox
showCheckbox.description: Show internal Checkbox (hidden in vertical orientation)

slotContent.name: slotContent
slotContent.description: Slot content (left side, used in CTA+Slot variants)

style.name: style
style.description: Row style variant matching Figma "Style" property

cells.name: cells
cells.description: Cells to render in the row area (CellAddons, TextCells, CellBadgePills, etc.)

footerSlot.name: footerSlot
footerSlot.description: Footer content (slot area — proofs, RTO score, custom content)

showFooter.name: showFooter
showFooter.description: Whether to show the dashed divider between cells and footer

modeOverrides.name: modeOverrides
modeOverrides.description: Mode overrides for Figma variable resolution (collection name → mode name)

pickerStyle.name: pickerStyle
pickerStyle.description: Activates the Tarmac TDS rendering path. When set, uses Emotion + theme tokens instead of Tailwind.

title.name: title
title.description: Title shown in the bottom sheet header (bottomSheet mode only)

subtext.name: subtext
subtext.description: Subtext shown below the title (bottomSheet mode only)

showSubtext.name: showSubtext
showSubtext.description: Whether to show the subtext row (bottomSheet mode only, default true)

onChange.name: onChange
onChange.type: (e: { value?: string | number; selected: boolean }) => void

onHeaderRow.name: onHeaderRow
onHeaderRow.type: (columns: ColumnType<RecordType>[], index?: number) => CSSProperties | { onClick?: () => void }

onRow.name: onRow
onRow.type: (record: RecordType, index?: number) => CSSProperties | { onClick?: () => void }

rowFooter.name: rowFooter
rowFooter.type: RowFooterConfig<RecordType> | ((record: RecordType, index: number) => ReactNode | null | undefined)

loading.name: loading
loading.type: boolean | { spinning?: boolean; indicator?: ReactNode; tip?: string }

locale.name: locale
locale.type: { emptyText?: ReactNode; filterConfirm?: ReactNode; filterReset?: ReactNode }

onChange.name: onChange

components.name: components

sticky.name: sticky
sticky.type: boolean | { offsetHeader?: number; offsetScroll?: number; getContainer?: () => HTMLElement }

itemRender.name: itemRender

classNames.name: classNames
classNames.type:
{
    root?: string
    uploadZone?: string
    fileInfo?: string
    errorState?: string
    icon?: string
    textContainer?: string
    title?: string
    description?: string
    button?: string
    deleteButton?: string
    fileName?: string
    fileSize?: string
    errorText?: string
  }

styles.name: styles
styles.type:
{
    root?: CSSProperties
    uploadZone?: CSSProperties
    fileInfo?: CSSProperties
    errorState?: CSSProperties
    icon?: CSSProperties
    textContainer?: CSSProperties
    title?: CSSProperties
    description?: CSSProperties
    button?: CSSProperties
    deleteButton?: CSSProperties
    fileName?: CSSProperties
    fileSize?: CSSProperties
    errorText?: CSSProperties
  }
